findings.problem: The chapter lands Jet's core realization, then keeps restating the same diagnosis in abstract summary. Once the laundromat material has already shown that criminal, cop, and cowboy were never cleanly separate selves, the later paragraphs package the point again instead of converting it into a sharper new consequence. That repetition softens escalation and keeps the ending in thematic recap rather than forward pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the overlapping thesis paragraphs beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:203, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:255, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:293, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:439 so the chapter states Jet's continuity problem directly only once. After that recognition, make the Bebop scene add a new on-page consequence: a specific lie, a concrete plan, or a visible relational shift rather than another summary of built silence.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a reader can identify one primary recognition beat in the laundromat material around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:203 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:255, and one distinct new consequence in the Bebop scene around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:439 that changes what Jet does or what the crew now knows. FAIL if the revision still repeats the same criminal/cop/cowboy diagnosis in multiple summary paragraphs without a new decision, cost, or leverage shift.

findings.problem: The chapter reuses a tidy dialogue ladder often enough to feel composed: direct question, withholding answer, explicit callout that the answer was evasive, then a controlled restatement. That pattern shows up with Donovan, Faye, and again around Hosuke at dinner. The laundromat woman's 'The big kind doesn't care where you sit' also lands as a polished maxim rather than overheard speech. The accumulation pushes the dialogue toward literary polish instead of pressured, lived conversation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen the exchanges beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:285, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:409. Keep Jet evasive, but vary the mechanics: let one question die unanswered, let one reply misfire, let interruption or physical business carry one refusal, and make the laundromat woman's line situational and local instead of aphoristic.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one of the cited exchanges still uses the exact pattern direct question -> evasive answer -> explicit meta-callout that it was not an answer, and if the laundromat beat around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:285 reads as character-specific speech rather than a quotable maxim. FAIL if multiple scenes still announce their own evasiveness in dialogue instead of letting pressure, interruption, or silence do that work.

findings.problem: The narration leans too often on the same negation-then-correction construction: the prose says what something is not, then walks toward what it is. Used once or twice, that can feel precise. Repeated this often, it becomes an audible tic and starts flattening Jet's otherwise strong interior register into a reusable sentence machine.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast several of the corrective ladders beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:405 into positive description, sensory detail, or direct statement. Keep at most one or two such negation pivots if you want them as a Jet-associated rhythm, but stop solving perception with the same move every time.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least three of the cited passages are rewritten without back-to-back negation/correction moves and the emotional distinction remains legible on first read. FAIL if the revised chapter still repeatedly relies on not/just/more-like scaffolding across these same beats.

summary: FAIL across all four lenses. The chapter has strong Mars texture, stable continuity, correct past-tense control, and a credible Jet-centered interior line, but it does not yet reach pass level because it restates its central insight after it has already landed, repeats a composed evasive-dialogue template, and leans on a recurring negation/correction prose tic often enough to feel patterned.
